behavior_summary: U8P_CODNS::look is a U8P_CODNS::look/examine handler that shows a short descriptive text 'chest of drawers ' to the player and then yields/suspends the U8P_CODNS::look process.

U8P_CODNS::use is a U8P_CODNS::use/interaction handler that reads the item's status word and toggles its UI (gump) state: if a particular status bit is set it closes the gump, otherwise it opens gump id 0x0D for the item.
notable_control_flow: U8P_CODNS::look: single bark (short description) then suspend — no branching.
U8P_CODNS::use: read status into a temporary (local1) => test bit 0x0100 => branch: call Item::closeGump(this) if set, else call Item::openGump(0x0D, this).
open_questions: What is the exact semantic meaning of status bit 0x0100 (interpreted here as 'gump open' or similar) — this is inferred from the branch but not explicitly documented.
Is gump id 0x0D a container-specific UI or a shared generic UI used by multiple items? (affects interpretation of UX and UX-state coupling).
Are there other code paths (outside these two processes) that set/clear the status bit tested by U8P_CODNS::use?

main_function.name: U8P_CODNS::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short description shown to the player when they examine the item (display a bark and suspend).
entry_conditions: Invoked by the engine when the player performs a 'U8P_CODNS::look' or 'examine' action on this item.

function_map.name: U8P_CODNS::look
function_map.role: show short description for examine/U8P_CODNS::look interactions

function_map.name: U8P_CODNS::use
function_map.role: handle player 'U8P_CODNS::use' action; toggle item's UI/gump open state based on item status

function_map.name: Item::getStatus
function_map.role: external API read of the item's status/flags word

function_map.name: Item::closeGump
function_map.role: external API to close an item's UI/gump

function_map.name: Item::openGump
function_map.role: external API to open a UI/gump for an item (called here with id 0x0D)

external_calls.purpose: Read the item's status/flags word into a temporary (local1) for bitwise testing to decide UI state.
Close the item's open UI/gump when the tested status bit indicates the UI is open (branch for bit set).
Open a UI/gump (gump id 0x0D) for the item when the tested status bit indicates the UI is closed (branch for bit clear).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_CODNS::look is a U8P_CODNS::look/examine handler that shows a short descriptive text 'chest of drawers ' to the player and then yields/suspends the U8P_CODNS::look process.
